parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: 'deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3.2', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: $json.system_prompt }, { role: 'user', content: $json.user_prompt }], max_tokens: 512, temperature: 0.75 } }}
={{ { material_id: $json.material_id, persona_id: $json.persona_id, post_type: $json.post_type, title: $json.title, body: $json.body, media_type: 'text', source: 'reactive', sort_order: -1 } }}

meta.notes: Reactive content loop: runs every 6h, fetches quiz failure hotspots + engagement summary, generates remedial posts from Exam Gremlin and Lecture Bestie in response to student struggles. Posts use source='reactive' and sort_order=-1 (pinned). Env vars: SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY, FEATHERLESS_API_KEY. RPCs required: get_quiz_failure_hotspots (engagement-rpc.sql), get_engagement_summary (engagement-rpc.sql).
